title: Homepage
summary: Hero claim + compressed cluster ribbon + practice teaser + writing teaser + chat entry. Replaces v2's polymath grid + bento hero.

strategy.decision: Replace v2's 4-way polymath grid with a single positioning thesis hero + a compressed cluster ribbon that exposes scope (8 clusters with counts) in the first viewport.
strategy.why: ADR-0001 locks 'context engineer' positioning over polymath framing. ADR-0009 introduces the cluster ribbon to expose the 88% of surface the v2 site hides (per synthesis §Scale-mismatch finding). The compressed ribbon brings breadth into the hero zone without falling into bento territory (R10 categorical refusal).
strategy.shipped: v2 ninochavez.co renders a polymath grid with 4 equal-weight interests (Software / Photography / Music / Writing) and a bento-card hero with lime + Bebas Neue display font. No scope visibility — reviewers must navigate to find depth.
strategy.gap: Proposed = single thesis + 8-cluster compressed ribbon + practice/writing teasers; Shipped = 4-way polymath grid + bento + lime + Bebas.
strategy.question: Does the compressed cluster ribbon hold attention or does it bury the hero claim? Test with 5-second-test against the proposed-view.

currentState.summary: v2 homepage — polymath grid, bento hero, lime accent, Bebas Neue display font, no cluster visibility.
currentState.screenshotCaption: v2 ninochavez.co full-page capture — pre-redesign branch.
sourceFiles: v2 ninochavez-main CF Pages deploy (pre-redesign branch)
currentState.annotation: Visual reset: kill bento + lime + Bebas (R10); replace polymath grid (R4) with cluster ribbon + thesis hero (ADR-0003 hero claim, ADR-0009 cluster pattern).
